Most-used guides ​

Pick a reading path ​

Your responsibilityRecommended starting point
Supreme AdminPlatform Administration Overview
KingKing Guide
Alliance LeaderAlliance Leader Guide
Co-Leader or import reviewerCo-Leader Guide → Imports & OCR
Alliance PlayerAlliance Player Guide
Subscription administratorSubscriptions & Usage Manager

Import screenshot flow ​

  1. Upload a screenshot or spreadsheet as a draft.
  2. Review names, scores, confidence, matches, and conflicts.
  3. Correct, rematch, or ignore uncertain rows.
  4. Accept only the rows that should become live data.

Review first

Uploading does not immediately write player results. The review screen is the safety boundary between detected data and saved data.

Plans, support, and the future ​

Use Subscriptions & Usage for current plan behavior and Troubleshooting when something is blocked. The Future Roadmap is clearly separated from current features and contains planning ideas only.

Built for the Kingshot Event Tracker community.
